selection_policy: Four vendor/contract, three policy/compliance, and three project-risk cases; includes evidence_backed, conservative draft, contradiction, missing-evidence, and adversarial-input outputs.
review_instructions: For every statement, compare the text with every listed source excerpt.
Set faithful to true only when the statement preserves numbers, dates, actors, modality, conditions, and direction.
Set material_overstatement to true for any contradiction, inversion, unsupported consequence, or dropped qualifier that changes meaning.
Compare generated_missing_evidence with every planted gap term and generated conflict statement with every planted contradiction term; complete all gap_and_conflict_review fields.
Do not change automated_anchor_status; it is mechanical context only and never decides the human judgment.

brief_reviews.title: Acme renewal decision before July 1 deadline
brief_reviews.decision_question: Should we renew Acme before the cancellation deadline?

statements.statement: Finance supports renewal conditionally on Security sign-off; Security review is still incomplete with no final recommendation or owner recorded.

source_evidence.source_excerpt:
From: Mina, Finance
Subject: Acme renewal
Acme proposed a 12% fee increase. Finance can support renewal if Security signs off.
Security review — Acme: review remains incomplete. Final recommendation and owner are not recorded.

statements.statement: Acme services auto-renew on August 1; cancellation notice must be received by July 1.

source_evidence.source_excerpt: AGREEMENT EXCERPT — Acme services auto-renew on August 1. Cancellation notice must be received by July 1. The current annual fee is $120,000.

statements.statement: Acme proposed a 12% fee increase; current annual fee is $120,000.

source_evidence.source_excerpt:

Subject: Acme renewal
Acme proposed a 12% fee increase. Finance can support renewal if Security signs off.
AGREEMENT EXCERPT — Acme services auto-renew on August 1. Cancellation notice must be received by July 1. The current annual fee is $120,000.

statements.statement: Finance can support renewal if Security signs off.

source_evidence.source_excerpt:
From: Mina, Finance
Subject: Acme renewal
Acme proposed a 12% fee increase. Finance can support renewal if Security signs off.

statements.statement: Finance can support renewal if Security signs off. Security review — Acme: review remains incomplete.

source_evidence.source_excerpt:
From: Mina, Finance
Subject: Acme renewal
Acme proposed a 12% fee increase. Finance can support renewal if Security signs off.
Security review — Acme: review remains incomplete. Final recommendation and owner are not recorded.

generated_missing_evidence: Security review — Acme: review remains incomplete.
Final recommendation and owner are not recorded.
generated_recommended_next_steps: Assign an owner to complete the Security review for Acme before the July 1 cancellation deadline.

brief_reviews.title: BrightDesk pilot continuation decision

Sales says BrightDesk saves about 20 minutes per proposal. Legal says the data-processing addendum is still unsigned.

brief_reviews.title: ParcelFlow renewal feasibility without a service-credit change
brief_reviews.decision_question: Can we renew ParcelFlow without a service-credit change?

statements.statement: ParcelFlow guarantees 99.5% monthly availability; service credits begin only when availability falls below 98.5%.

source_evidence.source_excerpt: ParcelFlow guarantees 99.5% monthly availability. Service credits begin only when availability falls below 98.5%. Renewal date is December 1.

statements.statement: Measured availability was 98.9% in May and 99.1% in June.

source_evidence.source_excerpt: Measured availability was 98.9% in May and 99.1% in June. Operations requested stronger service credits. Vendor response is missing.

statements.statement: Operations requested stronger service credits

source_evidence.source_excerpt: Measured availability was 98.9% in May and 99.1% in June. Operations requested stronger service credits. Vendor response is missing.

statements.statement: vendor response is missing

source_evidence.source_excerpt: Measured availability was 98.9% in May and 99.1% in June. Operations requested stronger service credits. Vendor response is missing.

statements.statement: ParcelFlow guarantees 99.5% monthly availability. Measured availability was 98.9% in May and 99.1% in June.

source_evidence.source_excerpt: ParcelFlow guarantees 99.5% monthly availability. Service credits begin only when availability falls below 98.5%. Renewal date is December 1.
Measured availability was 98.9% in May and 99.1% in June. Operations requested stronger service credits. Vendor response is missing.

generated_recommended_next_steps: Follow up with the vendor on their pending response regarding operations' request for stronger service credits before finalizing renewal.

brief_reviews.title: CedarPay Renewal Acceptability
brief_reviews.decision_question: Is CedarPay renewal acceptable given the audit issue?

statements.statement: CedarPay renewal is due January 20.

source_evidence.source_excerpt: CedarPay renewal is due January 20. Procurement recommends renewal at the existing $48,000 annual fee.

statements.statement: The December audit found one unresolved access-review exception.

source_evidence.source_excerpt: The December audit found one unresolved access-review exception. Compliance will not recommend renewal until the exception is closed.

statements.statement: Procurement recommends renewal at the existing $48,000 annual fee. Compliance will not recommend renewal until the exception is closed.

source_evidence.source_excerpt: CedarPay renewal is due January 20. Procurement recommends renewal at the existing $48,000 annual fee.
The December audit found one unresolved access-review exception. Compliance will not recommend renewal until the exception is closed.

generated_missing_evidence: The December audit found one unresolved access-review exception.
generated_recommended_next_steps: Assign ownership and a target date to close the December audit's access-review exception before January 20 renewal deadline.

brief_reviews.title: Data-center migration timing decision

Latest rehearsal took five hours and 20 minutes. Database validation alone took 90 minutes. No revised customer notice is approved.

decision_rule: ACCEPT only when at least ten current-revision Briefs are reviewed and no load-bearing statement materially overstates or contradicts its cited span.
